product_overview: TestHub is the test management module of the Catalyst Enterprise Portfolio Management platform. It helps users manage test cases, execute test cycles, and review execution-related information in a centralized workspace.
core_goals: Browse work items and open their detail view
View workflow state progression for an issue type
Manage and update subtasks from a detail panel

features.name: All Work List and Issue Detail Panel
features.description: Lets users browse all work items in a project and open a detail panel for a selected issue, with navigation between nearby items and panel mode controls.
user_flows: Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> View the work items list -> Open a work item row -> See the issue detail panel
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Move to the next item -> Move to the previous item -> Close the detail panel
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Toggle the detail panel mode -> Close the detail panel
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Use a deep link for a specific issue -> See the matching issue detail panel open

features.name: Description Section Editing and Image Upload
features.description: Provides inline editing for the issue description with rich text styling, save and cancel actions, section collapse control, and image attachment upload through paste or file selection.
user_flows: Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Click the description area -> Type text in the editor -> Save the description -> See the updated content
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Click the description area -> Type text in the editor -> Cancel the edit -> See the original description remain unchanged
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Click the description area -> Paste an image into the editor -> See the image upload into the description
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Click the description area -> Open the image picker from the editor toolbar -> Select a file -> See the image added to the description
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Collapse the description section -> Expand the description section

features.name: Workflow Viewer Modal
features.description: Shows the workflow diagram for an issue type, including the sequence of states, transition arrows, verb labels, and the current status highlight.
user_flows: Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Open the status popover -> Open the workflow view -> See the workflow diagram
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a work item row -> Open the status popover -> Open the workflow view -> Close the modal

features.name: Subtasks Panel
features.description: Displays child issues in a list-only table view and allows creating, updating, deleting, sorting, and customizing visible columns for subtasks.
user_flows: Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a story issue -> View the subtasks list -> Confirm the panel is shown as a list-only table
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a story issue -> Click add subtask -> Type a summary -> Press Enter to create the subtask -> See it appear in the list
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a story issue -> Click a subtask key -> See the subtask detail open
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a story issue -> Click a subtask status badge -> Choose a new status -> See the status update
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a story issue -> Click a subtask priority icon -> Choose a new priority -> See the priority update
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a story issue -> Open the row actions menu for a subtask -> Delete the subtask -> Confirm the deletion
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a story issue -> Open the column picker -> Toggle visible columns -> See the table columns change
Navigate to /project-hub/BAU/allwork -> Open a story issue -> Collapse the subtasks section -> Expand the subtasks section

routes.description: All work items list view with issue detail panel
Project all-work list with sidebar detail panel

features.name: Description Section - ADF Content Styling
features.description: Canonical description section for all CatalystView* components. Injects global styles for ADF content rendering with Jira-parity typography (14px/400/24px line-height). Includes click-to-edit with Atlaskit editor, image upload via paste/drop/toolbar button, and expand/collapse toggle.
user_interactions: Click description area to enter edit mode
Type text in the Atlaskit editor
Click Save to persist description
Click Cancel to discard changes
Click collapse/expand chevron to toggle section
Paste image into editor to upload attachment
Click Image button in editor toolbar to open file picker

features.name: Dark-Theme Select Input Fix
features.description: Fixes black bar artifact before None text in react-select sidebar fields (Fix versions, Labels, Assignee, Reporter, Priority) in dark mode. The global dark stylesheet was setting rgb(10,10,10) background on inputs. Fixed by prefixing selectors with .dark to match specificity.
user_interactions: View Fix versions field showing None with no black bar artifact
View Labels field showing None with no black bar artifact
Click Fix versions dropdown to open selector
Click Labels dropdown to open selector

features.name: Workflow Viewer Modal
features.description: Modal that shows the workflow diagram for a given issue type. Uses useWorkflows() hook with null guard. Renders a linear state chain with arrows, verb labels, and highlights current status.
user_interactions: Click status pill to open status popover
Click View workflow link in the popover
View workflow diagram with state nodes and arrows
Click Close button to dismiss the modal

features.name: SubtasksPanel - List-Only View
features.description: Child issues panel for Story detail view. List-only - no board/toggle (Jira parity). JiraTable with Type, Key, Summary, Assignee, Status, Fix Versions, Priority columns. Supports inline create, bulk edit, sort, column picker, keyboard navigation.
user_interactions: View subtasks list in JiraTable format
Confirm no list/board toggle button exists in the header
Click + button to create a subtask
Type subtask summary and press Enter to create
Click subtask key to open subtask detail
Click status badge to change subtask status
Click priority icon to change subtask priority
Click row actions menu to delete a subtask
Confirm delete in the Atlaskit modal dialog
Click collapse chevron to collapse the subtasks section
Click column picker to toggle visible columns

features.name: All Work Toolbar - Issue Detail Panel
features.description: Project all-work list with integrated issue detail overlay. Supports opening story/subtask detail. Navigation arrows, panel/full-page mode toggle.
user_interactions: Click any work item row to open detail panel
Navigate between items using prev/next arrows
Toggle panel mode
Close the detail panel
Use URL deep-link to open specific issue

known_limitations.issue: BoardView and ViewToggle files still exist but are no longer imported - dead code
DnD row reorder wired but not connected to JiraTable
